raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to find all .gz and decompress. Use find and gunzip -r? But need to unpack all .gz archives. Use find /workspace -name '*.gz' -exec gunzip -f {} \; . But if want to keep original? Unpack means decompress. So command: find /workspace -type f -name '*.gz' -exec gunzip -k {} \; maybe. But plain. I'll output: find /workspace -type f -name '*.gz' -exec gunzip -f {} \;
